CLI parse.description: Parse a local OCAP JSON replay into a compact (minimal v3) parse artifact JSON.

CLI schema.description: Export the current compact parse-artifact JSON Schema (stdout when --output omitted).

CLI worker.description: Run the RabbitMQ/S3 parser worker runtime (consumes parse jobs, writes artifacts to S3, publishes results).

CLI healthcheck.description: Hidden Docker health-check command probing the worker readiness endpoint.

GET /healthz.description: Worker HTTP liveness probe (Axum), cached HealthState snapshot.

GET /readyz.description: Worker HTTP readiness probe (Axum); reflects AMQP/S3 dependency ReadinessState and drain status.

AMQP consume parse.jobs.description: Consume ParseJobMessage deliveries from the RabbitMQ job queue (default parse.jobs).

AMQP publish parse.completed.description: Publish ParseCompletedMessage results to the result exchange with the completed routing key.

AMQP publish parse.failed.description: Publish ParseFailedMessage results to the result exchange with the failed routing key.

lib parse_replay.description: Pure deterministic parse entrypoint; caller supplies replay bytes and source metadata.

lib public_parse_replay.description: Public minimal-artifact parse path used by CLI and worker (strips debug provenance).
